meaning: n.苏(昔日法国之一种铜币),无价值之物
examples: And not a sou in the house!
My daughter dangerously injured, not a sou!
My poor children, you will not have a sou!
The whole town had turned out, thousands upon thousands of fans wearing pig hats and yelling Sou-ee, sou-ee, pig, pig, pig.
New Yorkers think nothing of turning up at a critical meeting in an ankle-length Driza-Bone coat, bright-yellow sou'wester and a plastic head scarf.
